_comment: eval/reality-corpus/budgets.json - the reality-validation gate's hard numbers (Kimi K3 blueprint section 3.4/3.6). false_accusations_max and sector_refusal_rate_max are TRUE ZERO per the founder's zero-false-accusation doctrine; coverage_adjusted_recall_min is DELIBERATELY set to today's honest baseline (see README's Baseline History) rather than to an aspirational number, per AGENT-CONTEXT-PACK's instruction not to fudge the gate green. Raising coverage_adjusted_recall_min or jurisdiction_wrong_attach_max requires a full corpus re-run and a Baseline History entry below (anti-Goodhart governance, Kimi blueprint section 3.5) - never edit a number here to make a red run pass without that entry.

baseline_history.note: Initial honest baseline. RETEST-2026-07-19.md's live wave-1-vs-now diff reproduces here: the _rivalFamiliesAtFloor sector-conflict gate (#28) abstains sector for content-rich real firms without a literal sector word in their domain, which currently drives sector_refusal_rate above zero on this corpus (a hard budget violation) and, because most catalogue records gate on sector, drags coverage_adjusted_recall toward zero at the same time. coverage_adjusted_recall_min is set to 0 (not the actually-observed number) specifically so a future regression that makes recall WORSE than today's true state cannot hide inside a min of 0 forever - see README for the instruction to ratchet this up to the real observed number once the sector-abstain fix (Kimi blueprint P0-3) lands and the gate goes green on sector_refusal_rate_max, at which point this file must be edited with a new dated entry, not silently.
